title: Ayapanopsis cuchabensis
taxonomy: Ayapanopsis cuchabensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Ayapanopsis, which is a group of plants native to the Americas. The plant's classification is further refined into the order Asterales and the class Magnoliopsida. The family Asteraceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. Additionally, Ayapanopsis cuchabensis can be classified into the kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all plant species.
